title: 5 pts
content:
5 pts
Full Credit
Expressed the central thesis or moral of the work in a fresh and new way.
0 pts
No Credit
The central thesis or moral of the work is not apparent or is not thoughtfully presented.
5 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Grammar and Spelling (Run-on sentences will receive special attention.)
Ensured that sentences are appropriately structured, and avoids run-on sentences.
5 pts
Full Credit
No more than 2 sentence errors
0 pts
No Credit
More than 3 sentence errors
5 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Grammar and Spelling (Verb tenses will receive special attention.)
Demonstrates the appropriate and consistent use of verb tenses (past, present, future, etc.) within paragraphs.
5 pts
Full Credit
No more than 2 verb tense errors
0 pts
No Credit
More than 2 verb tense errors
5 pts
This criterion is linked to a Learning OutcomeRough Draft: Grammar and Spelling (Punctuation will receive special attention.)
